rows.title: TOOL CONNECT 20V MAX* XR Compact Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take control of the jobsite with the TOOL CONNECT 20V MAX* XR Compact Drill/Driver. This Bluetooth-enabled product delivers efficient out-of-the-box compatibility to the TOOL CONNECT inventory management system. Track, manage, and customize the versatile 20V MAX* XR Compact Drill/Driver within the TOOL CONNECT Site Manager or TOOL CONNECT Control App. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: LAST SEEN feature helps reduce wasted time and money by providing the street address of where your compact drill/driver was last in range of your Tool Connect-enabled device
Easily and quickly assign tools to jobsites and users on the Tool Connect Inventory Manager software, increasing accountability and reducing lost tools
Receive diagnostics on your compact drill/driver like internal coin cell battery life, temperature, number of trigger pulls, and how long the tool has been running
additional_features: Set "disable when out of range" alerts to help deter unauthorized use or theft
Once you've downloaded the Tool Connect app, easily pair with the app by holding down the pair button on the tool foot for 3-5 seconds
Includes a default Home mode and 3 programmable modes to customize speed and light brightness
Customize the brightness and delay of the integrated LED light
Integrated blue LED light indicates when your compact drill/driver is paired with your Tool Connect app
DEWALT brushless motor delivers up to 75% more runtime vs. 18V NiCad brushed motors
Ergonomic comfort grip handle provides ideal balance and comfort
applications: Drilling into studs
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 1/2 in. Brushless Cordless Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Experience Power and complete a wide range of heavy-duty fastening applications with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless 1/2 in. Drill/Driver. Engineered for advanced performance, this versatile drill delivers up to 2,000 rpm when drilling into wood and metal. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Complete Challenging Projects - With up to 40% more UWO** vs. the DCD791B using DCB205 battery or DCBP034 DEWALT POWERSTACK battery (sold separately)
Access Hard To Reach Work Areas - Compact 6.37 in. size is 1/2 in. shorter in length*** compared to the DCD791, tool head only.
High Bit Retention - With 1/2 in. metal ratcheting chuck
additional_features: Pro-Level Speed, Control And Precision - High-speed transmission with variable trigger and 2 speed settings (0-650/0-2,000 rpm)
Brighten Work Areas - Adjustable 3-Position, 3 Mode LED with up to 70 Lumens, including LED spotlight mode which features a 20-minute shutoff function for extended work time in low-light spaces
Designed To Help You Get More Done - With optimized performance and runtime

Manage And Track Tools At The Jobsite - Drill/Driver chip pocket accepts Tool Connect chip DCE042 and connects with Tool Connect Site Manager app for seamless worksite asset management (DCE042 sold separately)
Drills Up To 2x The Holes¹ - When paired with the DCBP520 DEWALT POWERSTACK 5.0Ah Battery (Sold Separately)

^2DCD800 vs Leading competitor drilling 2-1/8 in. holes in 2 in. SPF lumber.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a wide range of demanding applications with the 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. Drill/Driver (battery and charger sold separately), our most powerful 20V MAX* 2-speed drill driver**. Make up to 175 holes per charge†† with this solution engineered up to 109% more powerful†. Equipped with the ANTI-ROTATION System that senses the rotational motion of the tool and shuts it down if the motion is excessive, this tool helps maximize control on demanding jobs Featuring a high-speed transmission and variable speed trigger with 2 speed settings, this drill/driver delivers professional level performance. Work confidently with a 1/2 in. metal ratcheting chuck and illuminate dim work areas with an integrated 3-position LED. As a part of our best performing line of 20V MAX* power tools, this XR drill/driver helps you maximize productivity on tough jobs. Battery and Charger Sold Separately.
features: Our Most Powerful 20V MAX* 2-Speed Drill Driver** - Complete a wide range of applications with this drill/driver that is up to 109% more powerful†.

Help Maximize Control - Equipped with the ANTI-ROTATION System that senses the rotational motion of the tool and shuts it down if the motion is excessive. The red LED indicator illuminates when the ANTI-ROTATION System is engaged.
Competitive Advantage - Up To 25% More Powerful Vs. Milwaukee***
additional_features: Professional Performance - Complete jobs with top level speed, control, and precision with a high-speed transmission and variable speed trigger featuring 2 settings (no load 0-650/0-2,000 rpm).
Bright LED Worklight - Illuminate dim work areas with an adjustable, 3-position LED featuring 70 lumens and auto-shutoff function.
Help Maximize Productivity - Make up to 175 holes per charge††.
High Bit Retention - Work confidently with a 1/2 in. metal ratcheting chuck that provides secure bit retention.

TOOL CONNECT CHIP READY - Featuring TOOL CONNECT CHIP READY functionality (DEWALT chip sold separately) when paired with the DEWALT Site Manager app‡ that shows data on jobsite asset management and tool location.
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools and Batteries‡‡ - Innovative power tools and batteries designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.
includes: (1) DCD801 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 1/2 in. Drill/Driver
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
**Based on rated MWO using DCB2104 battery.
†Based on rated MWO using DCB2104 battery vs. DCD777 Drill Driver.
††Using 7/8" diameter auger and DCB2104 battery in 1-1/2" SPF.
‡Additional subscription charge and third party data rate charges may apply.
‡‡Regarding battery, based on longer life (charge cycles) and more power, not in application vs. DEWALT 20V MAX* batteries with comparable amp hours.

***Based on MWO, using DCB2104 battery vs. Milwaukee M18 2903-20 1/2in. drill driver using 48-11-1840 4AH battery. Milwaukee and M18 are registered trademarks of Milwaukee Electric Tool Corp., which has not endorsed or approved this comparison.

rows.title: ATOMIC 20V MAX* Multi-Head Drill/Driver (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a variety of applications in hard-to-reach spaces with the ATOMIC 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless Multi-Head Drill/Driver (battery and charger sold separately). With 4 versatile attachments including a 1/2 in. (13mm) Metal Chuck Attachment, a 1/4 in. Hex Right Angle Attachment, a 1/4 in. Hex Quick Release Offset Attachment, and a 1/4 in. Hex Quick Release Attachment, this compact tool features a drop-in load mechanism that allows users to efficiently connect attachments to complete a variety of applications.
features: Versatile Capabilities - Take on a variety of applications with the included 1/2 in. (13mm) Metal Chuck Attachment, 1/4 in. Hex Right Angle Attachment, 1/4 in. Hex Quick Release Offset Attachment, and a 1/4 in. Hex Quick Release Attachment.
Reach Tough Areas - Access hard-to-reach spaces with included attachments that can be individually used (one at a time) on the Right Angle Attachment.
Quick Connection - Switch between applications quickly and easily with included attachments.
additional_features: Security Collar - Check if the attachment has been securely attached to your drill with the yellow collar around the chuck.
Help Maximize Organization - Mount the organizer to the wall using the keyholes or use the belt hooks provided to hang the tool or hold up to 4 attachment heads.
Power And Performance - Complete tough applications in tight spaces with up to 15% more power**.
Competitive Advantage - Get up to 128% more power vs. Milwaukee†.
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

†Based on MWO, using DCB203 battery (sold separately) vs. 2505-20 M12 FUEL Installation Drill/Driver using 48-11-2420 battery. Milwaukee, M12, and FUEL are registered trademarks of Milwaukee Electric Tool Corp., which has not endorsed or approved this comparison.
**Based on MWO using DCB205 battery (sold separately) vs. DCD777 Drill Driver.

rows.title: 1/2 in. VSR Pistol Grip Drill with E-CLUTCH
rows.description: The e-clutch system works by detecting sudden changes in tool rotation speed. When the tool senses a sudden increase in torque, such as when the bit encounters resistance or binds, the e-clutch engages and rapidly reduces the motor's power output. This helps to prevent the tool from twisting or jerking out of the user's hand.
features: DEWALT Perform and Protect line of power tools is designed to provide a high level of control, dust containment, or low vibration without sacrificing performance
E-CLUTCH system is a Perform and Protect control feature that shuts the tool off when a stall is detected to reduce reactionary torque in bind-up situations
10.5 Amp motor delivers increased drilling performance
additional_features: Patented DEWALT-built motor design generates 50% more power with increased overload protection for added durability
0-1200 RPM, variable speed reversing switch for increased versatility
Soft grip handle and two-finger trigger for increased comfort and greater control
Metal-gear housing for jobsite durability and increased reliability
